ddls:
CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Fiction, Non-Fiction, Poetry) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the award is targeted towards */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Name of the winner */,
  "winner_language" TEXT /* Language of the winning novel */,
  "winning_novel" TEXT /* Title of the winning novel */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image associated with the award */,
  "submission_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting novels for the award */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the award results are announced */,
  "jury_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the jury */,
  "digital_assets" TEXT /* References to digital assets related to the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shortlisted_nominees" (
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nominee */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award the nominee is associated with */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "novel_title" TEXT /* Title of the novel */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the novel */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the novel */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the novel */,
  "digital_assets" TEXT /* References to digital assets related to the nominee */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the nominee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nominee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shortlisted_nominees_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, judge, author) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, full) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the novel */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award the submission is for */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "novel_title" TEXT /* Title of the novel */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the novel */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the novel */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the novel */,
  "digital_assets" TEXT /* References to digital assets related to the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the novel was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the submission being evaluated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the judge who evaluated the submission */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given by the judge */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jury" (
  "jury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jury member */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is a jury member */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award the jury member is associated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the jury member (e.g., chair, member) */,
  "appointed_date" TEXT /* Date when the jury member was appointed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jury_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jury_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trending authors, popular languages) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "digital_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digital asset */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity the asset is related to (e.g., award, nominee, submission) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the asset is related to */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., image, document) */,
  "asset_url" TEXT /* URL to the digital asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES shortlisted_nominees ("nominee_id")
)
